description_long: This is a large, curved widescreen computer monitor with a sleek, modern design, likely intended for gaming or professional use. The front display features vibrant, colorful graphics and branding, with a thin bezel framing the screen and slightly rounded corners. The monitor is supported by a sturdy, V-shaped stand made of metallic or high-quality plastic material, providing stability and a contemporary look. The rear of the monitor is smooth and unadorned, with a central mounting point for the stand and no visible buttons or ports. The side views reveal the pronounced curvature of the display and the slim profile of both the screen and the stand. The overall construction suggests a combination of plastic, metal, and glass, with a hard, smooth, and slightly glossy surface finish.
description: A large, curved widescreen monitor with a thin bezel, vibrant display, and a sturdy V-shaped stand. The design is sleek and modern, with a smooth, hard surface and minimal visible controls.
description_view_0: Front view showing the curved display, thin bezel, colorful graphics, and the full V-shaped stand.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the pronounced curvature of the screen and the slim profile of the monitor and stand.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth back panel, central stand attachment, and absence of visible ports or buttons.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the curved screen and the monitor's thinness.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is thin, black, and frames the display with a minimalistic, modern look. It has slightly rounded corners and a smooth, matte finish, with no visible texture or decorative elements.
attribute_stand_type: V-shaped stand with two angled legs and a central support column, made of metallic or high-quality plastic material. The stand is wide and flat, providing stability, and appears to be fixed in height with no visible adjustability features.
attribute_button_placement: No physical buttons or controls are visible on the front, sides, or rear of the monitor in the provided images.
attribute_brand_logo: A brand logo is visible on the front display area, integrated into the screen graphics, positioned in the upper left and upper right corners, with distinctive colorful design elements.
